name: resolve_probe_fusion_tool
description: Inspect one named tool in the active Fusion composition or a Resolve timeline-item Fusion composition.

host.description: Target host: auto, resolve, or fusion.

timeline_item_id.description: Resolve timeline item unique id when targeting a Fusion comp on a specific timeline item.

clip_id.description: Alias of timeline_item_id for Resolve timeline item targeting.

timeline_item.description: Resolve timeline item selector with track_type, track_index, and item_index.

comp_name.description: Optional Fusion comp name on the targeted Resolve timeline item.

comp_index.description: Optional 1-based Fusion comp index on the targeted Resolve timeline item.

tool_name.description: Exact Fusion tool name to inspect.

include_attrs.description: Include raw attrs for the selected tool.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time to wait for the host helper.
